name: 爪子刀（★） | 表面淬火
descriptionEn: With its curved blade mimicking a tiger's claw, the karambit was developed as part of the southeast Asian martial discipline of silat. The knife is typically used with a reverse grip, with the finger ring on the index finger. It has been color case-hardened through the application of wood charcoal at high temperatures. A little color never hurt anyone
descriptionZh: 其弯曲的刀片如同猛虎的利爪一般，爪子刀是作为东南亚马来武术的一部分被研制出来的。这把匕首通常是用食指和无名指反握使用的。 通过木炭在高温下的应用，这把武器已被彩色表面淬火。 一点彩色痕迹无伤大雅
